prompt:
Build a system prompt trimmer module at src/pichay/trimmer.py that integrates with the proxy to selectively reduce system prompt waste. Read analyzer.py, proxy.py, and pager.py thoroughly before writing any code.

The trimmer should implement three interventions:

(1) TOOL DEFINITION TRIMMING: The API request body has a 'tools' parameter (list of tool JSON schemas). The analyzer found 18 defined tools but only ~5 used per session — 45K bytes/request wasted. Replace unused tool definitions with one-line stubs (just name + description stub). On first use of a stubbed tool, re-inject the full definition. Track which tools have been used in a session-scoped set. The proxy.py route handler at /v1/messages has access to body['tools'].

(2) SKILL DEDUPLICATION: The analyzer found skills tripled across message injection blocks (system-reminder tags in user messages). Skills appear under prefixes like 'pptx', 'example-skills:pptx', 'document-skills:pptx'. Keep only the first occurrence of each base skill name. The _extract_skill_entries and _find_duplicate_skills functions in analyzer.py show the pattern.

(3) STATIC COMPONENT CACHING: Track content hashes of system prompt components across turns. If a component's hash hasn't changed since last turn, it could be skipped. For now, just LOG which components are static and how many bytes would be saved — don't actually strip them yet (that requires frontend KV cache integration we don't have).

Integration requirements:
- Add a --trim flag to proxy.py (alongside --compact). Both can be active simultaneously.
- The trimmer should be a class (SystemPromptTrimmer) that the proxy instantiates and calls on each request.
- Log all trimming decisions to the proxy's JSONL log via a 'trimming' record type.
- Include a standalone CLI entry point for offline analysis of proxy logs (similar to analyzer.py and replay.py).
- Match the coding style of the existing modules (dataclasses, type hints, docstrings).

Key details from the codebase:
- proxy.py create_app() takes log_dir, compact, age_threshold, min_size
- proxy.py log_record() appends JSONL records
- The request body structure: body['system'] (list of text blocks), body['messages'] (message array), body['tools'] (tool schemas)
- analyzer.py _SP_SECTIONS and _REMINDER_PATTERNS show system prompt structure
- Each tool in body['tools'] is a dict with 'name', 'description', 'input_schema'

Do NOT modify any test files. Create only src/pichay/trimmer.py and modify proxy.py to integrate the trimmer.
